metadata.description: Run Claude on a slim token margin. Orchestrates graphify, claude-mem, and caveman to spend tokens on decisions, not comprehension.

plugins.name: slim-margin
plugins.description: Run Claude on a slim token margin. Enforces budget discipline and smart model-tier routing (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) on long, complex, or codebase-heavy tasks. REQUIRES graphify, claude-mem, and caveman — fails closed if any are missing.
